step1.title: 1. Map Data
step1.desc: Synchronize your data sources ensuring Common Data Model integrity.

step2.title: 2. Run analysis
step2.desc: Launch analytic scripts and monitor execution.

step3.title: 3. Outputs
step3.desc: Access artifacts, reports, and execution logs.

data_upload.title: Map your data
data_upload.rule_cleanup: Each new file upload initiates a comprehensive cleaning process. Previous data for each entity will be deleted to ensure the integrity of the new series. Therefore, the complete set of files must be uploaded every time.
data_upload.rule_segments: For high data volumes, the system allows for segmented file uploads. These will be mapped together to the same entity as long as they share an identical header structure.
data_upload.subtitle_files: Select the CSV files from your system. We recommend using UTF-8 encoding without a BOM and with the “|” delimiter.

pipeline.human_notice: The process has concluded without system incidents. However, successful technical execution does not guarantee the absence of warnings or logical discrepancies within the data content. A thorough review of the logs is recommended to confirm that the volume of processed records matches expectations and that no integrity alerts were generated during the load.
pipeline.halted_msg: Pipeline execution halted. Check the report below for details.

logs.no_logs: No logs available for this process yet.

audit.log_notice: To get a row-by-row breakdown of these errors, please check the full audit log in the 'Inspect Logs' section below the terminal.
audit.fatal_notice: A critical non-compliance with the common data model has been detected in this entity. Please review the technical specification, the detailed log, and if the error persists, contact the coordinating node.

reset.title: Reset Workspace?
reset.text: This will clear current logs and quality results.

header.title: Run analysis
header.description: Run the analysis scripts provided by the project coordinators. Once finalized, you can consult the detailed outputs and audit the source code in the 'Outputs' section.

update_banner.title: Update Available
update_banner.desc: New analytical improvements found in repository.

purge_confirm.title: Delete project data?
purge_confirm.text: This action will delete all records from the entities that have been mapped to the Common Data Model.
purge_confirm.success_text: Project entities have been cleared successfully.

check_swal.title: Check for Updates?
check_swal.text: The system will establish a temporary connection to GitHub.com to verify if a newer version exists.
check_swal.info: This action requires internet access. No project data or clinical results will be transmitted.

up_to_date.title: System Up to Date
up_to_date.text: Your current analysis version ({{version}}) is the latest available.

sync_swal.title: External Connection Required
sync_swal.text: The system is about to establish a secure connection to GitHub.com to synchronize the latest analytic routines.
sync_swal.warning_desc: A ZIP archive will be downloaded and extracted. Only analysis scripts in your_project/src/analysis-scripts will be updated.
sync_swal.dep_desc: If the new code requires new libraries, this synchronization will not be enough. In such cases, you must update the Docker image.
sync_swal.note_desc: If your security policy restricts outbound connections, please manually update the Docker infrastructure.

stop.title: Stop Process?
stop.text: This will terminate the script immediately. Unsaved progress might be lost.

terminal.update_start: [UPDATE] Handshake initialized. Waiting for GitHub stream...
terminal.notice: ⚠️ SYSTEM NOTICE: An analysis process is currently running in the background.
terminal.wait_notice: The UI will unlock automatically when finished.
terminal.error_notice: The script finished with errors. Please check the log lines.

header.title: Consult, download, and audit outputs.
header.subtitle: Explore generated reports, download final output files, or inspect the original source code to ensure process transparency.

viewport.standby_desc: Select a file to mount preview

purge_swal.title: CLEAR PROJECT RESULTS?
purge_swal.text: This will delete all output files and reset the analytical database. This action is irreversible.
